title: You Are a Badass at Making Money
author: Jen Sincero
subline: Master the inner game of wealth — and earn what you're worth.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A giant $ sign dominates the upper half, drawn as a wordmark. Behind it: 30 small $ signs in a 'raining money' field, all graphite except ONE which is RED. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 700)" fill="none">
    <!-- 30 small $ signs scattered in a 1300x800 area, each at varying size and opacity -->
    <g font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-weight="500">
      <text x="-600" y="-200" font-size="40" fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.5">$</text>
      <text x="-500" y="-100" font-size="32" fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.6">$</text>
      <text x="-400" y="-220" font-size="48" fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.55">$</text>
      <text x="-300" y="-80" font-size="28" fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.5">$</text>
      <text x="-200" y="-200" font-size="36" fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.6">$</text>
      <text x="-100" y="-120" font-size="44" fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.55">$</text>
      <text x="0" y="-200" font-size="32" fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.6">$</text>
      <text x="100" y="-100" font-size="40" fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.5">$</text>
      <text x="200" y="-220" font-size="28" fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.55">$</text>
      <text x="300" y="-80" font-size="48" fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.6">$</text>
      <text x="400" y="-200" font-size="32" fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.5">$</text>
      <text x="500" y="-100" font-size="44" fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.55">$</text>
      <text x="600" y="-220" font-size="36" fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.6">$</text>
      <text x="-650" y="0" font-size="44" fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.55">$</text>
      <text x="-500" y="100" font-size="32" fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.6">$</text>
      <text x="-350" y="50" font-size="28" fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.5">$</text>
      <text x="-150" y="100" font-size="40" fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.6">$</text>
      <text x="50" y="50" font-size="48" fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.55">$</text>
      <text x="250" y="100" font-size="32" fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.5">$</text>
      <text x="450" y="50" font-size="36" fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.6">$</text>
      <text x="600" y="100" font-size="28" fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.55">$</text>
      <text x="-600" y="200" font-size="32" fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.6">$</text>
      <text x="-400" y="240" font-size="40" fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.5">$</text>
      <text x="-200" y="220" font-size="28" fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.55">$</text>
      <text x="0" y="240" font-size="36" fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.6">$</text>
      <text x="200" y="220" font-size="48" fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.5">$</text>
      <text x="400" y="240" font-size="32" fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.6">$</text>
      <text x="600" y="220" font-size="40" fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.55">$</text>
      <text x="-500" y="320" font-size="36" fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.6">$</text>
      <text x="-100" y="340" font-size="28" fill="#4c4c4c" opacity="0.55">$</text>
    </g>
    <!-- ONE $ sign in red, larger, slightly off-center — the 'money that's yours' -->
    <text x="100" y="320" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="100" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46">$</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: Sincero's whole argument: money is an energy/mindset thing. The cover is a field of 30 small $ signs (rain) across the top 2/3, all in graphite with varying opacity. ONE $ sign in the field is RED and 2x size — the 'your money' sign that stands out. Title sits in the middle, weight 500 command, UPPERCASE. Brand '$$$' in the top-right; pill '$$$' at the top — the doubled-up dollar energy of the book.
